name: Ribbed Glass Wall Plug-In Wax Warmer - Threshold™
description:
The Ribbed Glass Wall Plug-In Wax Warmer from Threshold™ provides a creative touch to your living area. This simple and safe substitute for conventional flame candles releases a calming scent and a soft light. Simply plug it in to experience a peaceful atmosphere. This wax warmer from Threshold™ also makes for stylish night lights.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
